# Sage AI - Chat-First Community Runtime

> The lean-core autonomous runtime for Discord communities.

Sage is an enterprise-grade autonomous system designed to orchestrate and manage digital communities. It uses a chat-first runtime with PostgreSQL-backed memory, approval-aware governance, and provider-flexible model routing rather than a command-only bot workflow.

## Architecture Data

*   **Database Stack**: PostgreSQL (profiles, summaries, messages, approvals, artifacts, task runs).
*   **Infrastructure Context**: Sage retrieves context dynamically via tool calls rather than prepending massive raw transcripts.
*   **Capabilities**: Chat-first agent runtime, approval-gated governance, durable background tasks, file intelligence, and end-to-end workflow execution.

## References

*   **GitHub**: https://github.com/BokX1/Sage
*   **Technologies**: Discord API, PostgreSQL, LangGraph, Pollinations.ai, OpenAI Codex auth.
